items.name: OCP Uniforms
items.whyNeeded: Worn daily throughout the course. Expect wear and tear during field exercises.
items.selectionTips: Bring four sets minimum. Mark everything with your name and rank.

items.name: Combat Boots (Broken In)
items.description: Two pairs of well-broken-in combat boots
items.whyNeeded: Field exercises involve extended foot movement. Blisters slow you down and draw negative attention.
items.selectionTips: Break both pairs in over at least 3 months. Rotate daily to let them dry.

recommendedProducts.name: Garmont T8 NFS Tactical Boot
recommendedProducts.reason: Lightweight and fast-drying — ideal for the mix of classroom and field work at Fort Liberty. Breaks in faster than full-leather alternatives.

items.name: Laptop (Personal)
items.description: Personal laptop for coursework and media production
items.whyNeeded: PSYOP BQC involves significant media production, briefing preparation, and target audience analysis work.
items.selectionTips: A reliable laptop with presentation and basic design software is essential. Check with your cadre for specific requirements.

items.name: Rucksack (65L+)
items.description: Large frame rucksack for field exercises
items.whyNeeded: Field training exercises require carrying full kit over varied terrain.
items.selectionTips: Same pack you'd use for any Army school. Break it in before the course.

recommendedProducts.name: ALICE Large Field Pack with Frame
recommendedProducts.reason: The proven standard for Army field operations. External frame distributes load across long field exercises at Fort Liberty.

items.name: Identification Documents
items.whyNeeded: Required for in-processing at Fort Liberty.
items.selectionTips: Bring multiple copies of your orders. Keep originals in a secure folder.

items.name: Wool Socks (Quality)
items.whyNeeded: Foot care is critical during field exercises.
items.selectionTips: Darn Tough or Smartwool. Bring at least 8 pairs.

recommendedProducts.name: Darn Tough Tactical Micro Crew
recommendedProducts.reason: Lifetime guarantee and superior moisture management. Keeps feet dry through Fort Liberty's humid climate during extended field problems.

items.name: Portable Hard Drive
items.selectionTips: PSYOP coursework generates large media files. Back up everything regularly.

items.name: Notebooks and Pens
items.description: Waterproof field notebook and writing supplies
items.selectionTips: Rite in the Rain notebooks are ideal for field exercises. Take detailed notes during lectures.

recommendedProducts.name: Rite in the Rain All-Weather Notebook
recommendedProducts.reason: Waterproof paper survives Fort Liberty rain and humidity. Essential for recording target audience analysis data in the field.

items.name: Headlamp
items.selectionTips: Useful for field exercises and night operations. Red filter preserves night vision.

recommendedProducts.name: Princeton Tec Remix Pro Headlamp
recommendedProducts.reason: Reliable multiple-mode headlamp trusted by SOF units. Runs on standard AAs for hundreds of hours in the field.

items.name: Unauthorized Recording Devices
items.description: Personal cameras or recording equipment in classified areas
items.notes: PSYOP coursework includes sensitive material. No personal recording in instructional areas without permission.

items.name: Civilian Clothing (During Duty)
items.notes: Uniform is required during all duty hours. Civilian clothes for off-duty time only.
